canonical_question: What are Tray.io capabilities for developer-oriented complex integration orchestration?
aliases: What can Tray.ai Universal Automation Cloud do for ERP integration?
How does Tray.io compare to Workato and MuleSoft for enterprise integration?
What are Tray.io's API rate limits, connectors, and developer features?
Is Tray.io suitable for complex multi-system ERP orchestration?

temporal_validity.last_breaking_change: 2024 — rebrand from Tray.io to Tray.ai, UAC launch with Tray Code/Build/Chat

constraints: Data payload between workflow steps limited to 6 MB — must chunk larger payloads
API rate limit: 30 requests/second (1,800/min) with burst to 50 req/s momentarily
Call Connector endpoint: max 1,000 concurrent requests (concurrency-limited, not rate-limited)
Standard connector timeout: 45 seconds (120s for CDK-built connectors)
Webhook trigger payload limited to 1 MB (10 MB for multipart file uploads)
No pre-built SAP ERP connector — requires HTTP Client or Connector Builder
Task credits are consumption-based — each workflow step consumes credits
Log retention: 7-30 days depending on plan tier

skip_this_unit_if.condition: User needs a free or open-source integration tool
User needs deep SAP-native integration with IDoc/BAPI support

often_confused_with.label: MuleSoft — API-led connectivity vs Tray's workflow-centric model

inputs_needed.question: What integration pattern do you need?
